user_query: I'm researching electric cars for a magazine article. Can you give me the specifications and expert ratings for the Tesla Model 3, Chevrolet Bolt, and Nissan Leaf? I'm particularly interested in their comfort, technology, and value.

TaskList.description: Collect expert ratings and reviews for Tesla Model 3 focusing on comfort, technology, and value
Collect expert ratings and reviews for Chevrolet Bolt focusing on comfort, technology, and value
Collect expert ratings and reviews for Nissan Leaf focusing on comfort, technology, and value
Compile all gathered specifications and ratings into a final report
